scripts.build: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:backend
scripts.package:win: npm run build && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/myapp-go.exe && electron-builder --win
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/myapp-go && electron-builder --mac
scripts.package:linux: npm run build && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -o bin/myapp-go && electron-builder --linux
